articles.title: European round-up: Kane proves a suber-sub in Bayern win
articles.description: Harry Kane scored a late winner as Bundesliga champions Bayern Munich fought back from 3-0 down at Mainz to win 4-3 and extend their lead at the top of the table to 18 points.

articles.title: Man City late show beats Southampton to reach FA Cup final
articles.description:
